Jiangsu Zhongjunwei Industrial Co., Ltd. presents a severe case of registry misclassification, existing as a highly capitalized but fragmented micro-trading shell rather than an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer'. The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been completely eradicated. While officially tagged under 'Computer and Electronic Equipment Manufacturing' with a substantial 10 Million RMB paid-in capital, its physical metrics dictate a different reality: it maintains a micro-workforce of only 9 insured employees. Its bizarre, omnibus business scope—ranging from 'oil purifier R&D' and 'metal/building materials' to 'jewelry and gold/silver sales'—explicitly confirms it is not a focused electronic manufacturing plant.
